title: Iterative Process of Model Modification Using Residuals
description: A flowchart illustrating the cyclical process of analyzing model residuals to diagnose issues and guide improvements in a time series model.
relationships: Sequential flow from 'Initial Model Fit' to 'Calculate Residuals' to 'Analyze Residuals', with a decision loop based on the analysis leading either to 'Identify Model Deficiency' and back to 'Propose Model Modification' or to the final 'Satisfactory Model'
